videoTimeline.PTH: Hi! I am Lional. J. Welcome to my Youédit app. I am glad you are here...
videoTimeline.name: videoText

overlayTimeline.name: text14
overlayTimeline.PTH: Lets see what this editor have for you...

overlayTimeline.name: text6
overlayTimeline.PTH: You can add youtube videos and online videos to make video presentation with just its url.

overlayTimeline.name: text8
overlayTimeline.PTH: The player has ability to change video to grayscale and much more.

overlayTimeline.name: text5
overlayTimeline.PTH:
All you need is to have youtube video urls or
online video urls to make your own video sequence.

overlayTimeline.name: text5
overlayTimeline.PTH: The app has ability to resize the video and any contents as much as you want.

overlayTimeline.name: text5
overlayTimeline.PTH: The plus is that you can mute original audio and replace with own audio.

overlayTimeline.name: text5
overlayTimeline.PTH: You can add static Text as video frame and also svg content as video frame.

overlayTimeline.name: text5
overlayTimeline.PTH: You can rotate animate all the visual media.

overlayTimeline.name: text5
overlayTimeline.PTH: Lot more functionalities will be coming.

overlayTimeline.name: text2
overlayTimeline.PTH: The video creator and player is developed by Engineer Lional.J.

overlayTimeline.name: text8
overlayTimeline.PTH: For any queries regarding this player

overlayTimeline.name: text8
overlayTimeline.PTH: Please reach to me through mail - jpleoleo@gmail.com

videoList.name: Spring
videoList.details: Spring is the story of a shepherd girl and her dog, who face ancient spirits in order to continue the cycle of life. This poetic and visually stunning short film was written and directed by Andy Goralczyk, inspired by his childhood in the mountains of Germany.
